chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَدَلُّ بِهِ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ عَلَى الْمَحْمَدَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – What the praiseworthiness is evidenced by from the the woman

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/28)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/28)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) تَزَوَّجْهَا عَيْنَاءَ سَمْرَاءَ عَجْزَاءَ مَرْبُوعَةً فَإِنْ كَرِهْتَهَا فَعَلَيَّ الصَّدَاقُ .

en.hubeali: Sahl, from Bakr Bin Salih, from Malik Bin Asheym, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Marry her (for her) large eyes, brunette (colour), (large) buttocks, medium stature, so if you dislike her, upon me<sup>asws</sup> would be the dower’.
en.sarwar: 7. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Bakr ibn Salih from certain persons of his people who have said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is of the well-being of a man who on moving aside the veil of a woman finds her white.’”
